sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Katen nading innpinuam, upna tawh gal et in,
Nunna guntui luang sial sial, huih dam zong nung hiau hiau,
Vantung misiang tho te'n phatna lasa ziah ziah,
Ka ten nading innpi nuam, in kei hong ngak gi ge.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Honpa'n tokhom tungpan ngak lah in hong en en,
Hua gungal pek pek ah, kham khuapi nuam sungah,
Phatna lasa khawm ding, Tuu no pawipi sungah.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ka kha bek hong gum hilo, Ka pumpi zong hong gum,
Hih leitung gimna lianpi hongthuaksak ngei lo ding
Van inn nuam ka ciah ciang honghon Topa Zeisu'n
A hong dawnding a maw, Lung dam khut ki len ding.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hih leitung pan vantung ah ka lentoh ni ciangin.
Hona Honpa vangliat na tawh, mitphiat kal ka leng ding
Leitung mangpha ciding, Aw nuam zen Hallelu,
Hallelujah ci'n phat na la sa sa ding.
